title: Anti Server Resourcepack
description: Anti Server Resourcepack lets you skip server resourcepack loading :)
body:
**Tired of servers forcing ugly or laggy resource packs on you?**
This mod gives you **full control** over what gets loaded into your game.
**Anti Server Resource Pack** completely blocks server-side resource packs, so nothing is downloaded or applied without your permission.

Perfect for **PvP**, **performance-focused players**, or anyone who just wants a **clean and consistent look** across all servers.
No more surprise textures, no custom sounds, no FPS drops caused by massive packs.

**Simple, lightweight, Fabric-only**, and does exactly one thing — and does it well.
Install it once and **play your way**, not the server’s way.
